"use client" import { useContext } from "react" import { ProfileContext } from "../../context/profile/ProfileContext" import Spinner from "../layout/Spinner" const GithubStats = () => { const { githubStats, loading } = useContext(ProfileContext) if (loading) { return } if (!githubStats) { return (

GitHub Stats

Add your GitHub profile to see stats here.

) } return (

GitHub Stats

Followers

{githubStats.followers}

Following

{githubStats.following}

Public Repos

{githubStats.publicRepos}

Public Gists

{githubStats.publicGists}

Top Repositories

    {githubStats.topRepos.map((repo) => (
  • {repo.name}

    {repo.description}

    ⭐ {repo.stars} 🍴 {repo.forks} {repo.language && {repo.language}}
    • ))}
) } export default GithubStats
